arts.ttl: Richard Hughes has obvious next Liverpool move as January transfer scrutiny increases
arts.sum: Liverpool remain quiet in the January transfer window as their Premier League title rivals start to look at bolstering their squads

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Man Utd, Liverpool and Tottenham FA Cup dates revealed as fourth round TV schedule is announced
arts.sum: Some intriguing ties will take place in the fourth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Liverpool dealt transfer blow as medical completed for potential Mo Salah replacement
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are close to completing a deal with Napoli for Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, who had previously been a transfer target for the Premier League leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta rejects Liverpool title theory as Arsenal search for answers in transfer market
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has rejected suggestions that the Premier League title race is between just his side and Liverpool

arts.ttl: 'You have to' - Ryan Gravenberch addresses Liverpool fitness fears
arts.sum: Ryan Gravenberch has been a virtual ever-present for Liverpool in midfield this season

arts.ttl: Barcelona readying €70m swoop for Liverpool star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona are putting into place the necessary financial parameters to move forward with an offer for Liverpool star Luis Díaz this summer. That’s according to Diario Sport,…

arts.ttl: The Liverpool transfer problem their Premier League title rivals wish they had
arts.sum: Arne Slot has utilised his squad efficiently and further additions now could disrupt the harmony at Anfield as the team bids for a famous quadruple

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all ten of this weekend's games
arts.sum: Aaron Ashley has picked out a score prediction for all 10 Premier League matches taking place on Saturday, Sunday and Monday.

arts.ttl: Charlie Adam makes Everton pitch as David Moyes considers ex-Liverpool man for coaching role
arts.sum: Charlie Adam says he is 'fascinated' by experienced managers such as Everton's David Moyes and is keen to learn from them as he seeks to chart a career in management

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans pen letter urging lower ticket prices
arts.sum: A number of Liverpool supporter groups have teamed up to write an open letter to the club, saying they don't want increased ticket prices to "kill the Kop," by forcing out local and generational fans.
